entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -
[info] loaded in 4.25 secs at 2026-05-19T16:10:10 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/894556/000164033424001211/gevi_10qa1.htm
[xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.072006. - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/894556/000164033424001211/gevi_10qa1.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0109.9569 - 16:10:18.701927 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/894556/000164033424001211/gevi_10qa1.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/894556/000164033424001211/gevi_10qa1.htm - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/894556/000164033424001211/gevi_10qa1.htm

[DQC.US.0109.9569] The concept us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 with value 0 should always be used with the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis the ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis and a third axis to identify the risk area. This element can only have a value of 1 when only the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis and ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis are used. This fact needs another axis to identify the specific gevi:PurchaseMember risk. If this value represents the Concentration Risk, Threshold Percentage then use the extension element ConcentrationRiskThresholdPercentage.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:
Period :2023-01-01 to 2023-03-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis=gevi:PurchaseMember, us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis=gevi:SupplierCustomerAMember Unit : pure
Rule Element Id:9569 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - gevi_10qa1.htm 2

[DQC.US.0109.9569] The concept us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 with value 0 should always be used with the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis the ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis and a third axis to identify the risk area. This fact needs another axis to identify the specific gevi:PurchaseMember risk. If this value represents the Concentration Risk, Threshold Percentage then use the extension element ConcentrationRiskThresholdPercentage.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:

[DQC.US.0109.9569] The concept us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 with value 0.9667 should always be used with the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis the ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis and a third axis to identify the risk area. This element can only have a value of 1 when only the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis and ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis are used. This fact needs another axis to identify the specific gevi:PurchaseMember risk. If this value represents the Concentration Risk, Threshold Percentage then use the extension element ConcentrationRiskThresholdPercentage.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:
Period :2022-01-01 to 2022-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis=gevi:PurchaseMember, us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis=gevi:SupplierCustomerAMember Unit : pure
Rule Element Id:9569 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - gevi_s1.htm 2

If this value represents the Concentration Risk, Threshold Percentage then use the extension element ConcentrationRiskThresholdPercentage.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:
Period :2024-01-01 to 2024-06-30 Dimensions : us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis=gevi:SupplierCustomerBMember, us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis=gevi:AccountsPaybleMember Unit : pure
Rule Element Id:9569 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - gevi_s1.htm 2

[DQC.US.0109.9569] The concept us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 with value 0.1577 should always be used with the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis the ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis and a third axis to identify the risk area. This element can only have a value of 1 when only the ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis and ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis are used. This fact needs another axis to identify the specific gevi:PurchaseMember risk. If this value represents the Concentration Risk, Threshold Percentage then use the extension element ConcentrationRiskThresholdPercentage.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:
Period :2024-01-01 to 2024-06-30 Dimensions : us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis=gevi:SupplierCustomerAMember, us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis=gevi:PurchaseMember Unit : pure
Rule Element Id:9569 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - gevi_s1.htm 2
